entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A nutrient-rich cereal crop targeted for nutritional security in India

entities.name: MICRONUTRIENTS
entities.description: Essential vitamins and minerals that enrich crops to improve nutrition

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where micronutrient-rich pearl millet is promoted for nutritional security

entities.name: FOOD
entities.description: The major source of energy and essential for growth and development

entities.name: ENERGY
entities.description: The power derived from food necessary for biological processes

entities.name: GROWTH
entities.description: Biological increase in size supported by food and energy

entities.name: DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: Biological maturation process supported by food and energy

entities.name: CEREALS
entities.description: Staple foods that serve as the main source of daily dietary energy

entities.name: DIETARY ENERGY
entities.description: Energy obtained from daily food consumption, primarily from cereals

entities.name: DIETARY DIVERSITY
entities.description: The variety of food items consumed in a diet

entities.name: NUTRIENT DEPRIVATION
entities.description: A state of lacking essential nutrients caused by low dietary diversity

entities.name: MALNUTRITION
entities.description: A health condition resulting from nutrient deprivation and low dietary diversity

entities.name: DEVELOPING COUNTRIES
entities.description: Regions where nutrient deprivation and malnutrition are particularly prevalent
